title: cenchrus clandestinus
intro: Cenchrus clandestinus, also known as the desert broom grass or sandbur grass, is a type of annual grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus clandestinus include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, headache, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to protect against infections and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Cenchrus clandestinus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and roots.
